items.description: AI Product Management Agent — 38 skills, 8-stage pipeline (P0→P7), auto-routing, conflict detection. Problem before solution. Boundaries before capabilities.

The skpm command-line tool for installing, publishing, and managing AI skill packages. A single static Go binary with no runtime dependencies. Run `skpm install <skill>` to add skills to your AI agent in seconds.

Agent skills for fallow, codebase intelligence for JavaScript and TypeScript. Teaches AI agents how to find unused code, duplication, circular deps, complexity hotspots, architecture drift, and (with Fallow Runtime) hot-path and cold-path evidence. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, and 30+ agents.

A modular Rust-based self-learning episodic memory system for AI agents, featuring hybrid storage with Turso (SQL) and redb (KV), async execution tracking, reward scoring, reflection, and pattern-based skill evolution. Designed for real-world applicability, maintainability, and scalable agent workflows.
The open catalog of AI agent skills — 2,000+ security-scanned skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and more.

Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

Collection of structured lab tasks built with NestJS for the Advanced Web Technology course. Covers core concepts like controllers, services, DTO validation, file uploads, and modular architecture, helping develop practical backend skills and real-world API design experience.

A modern, responsive personal portfolio website showcasing projects, qualifications, and technical skills. Features a Next.js frontend deployed to AWS S3 + CloudFront and an Express.js backend running on AWS Lambda.
